race.comment: YOWERI (7) has been racing in far richer company, finishing fourth fresh at Doomben then last time at Eagle Farm when finishing sixth. This suits and blinkers go on. Should be at top and looks hard to beat this easier field. ENCHAANTED (11) was five lengths away fresh in tougher company and has upside. Very well weighted here and will take catching. INDAMOUSE (6) made debut in richer company and after getting well back found the line nicely. Went for another break and has more upside than most. Big watch fresh. BRASS BAND (2) was close to the winner fresh and appeals as one of the hardest to beat.
